prompt: Generate a single string of exactly 20 decimal digits (0–9) with all of the following constraints:
constraints: The string contains exactly 1 occurrence of the substring 2026.
The string contains no occurrence of 000.
The string must not start with 0.
The string must end with an odd digit.
The total number of even digits (0,2,4,6,8) is exactly 10.
full_content:
Case 1: Number String  
Generate a single string of exactly 20 decimal digits (0–9) with all of the following constraints:

* The string contains exactly 1 occurrence of the substring 2026.  
* The string contains no occurrence of 000.  
* The string must not start with 0.  
* The string must end with an odd digit.  
* The total number of even digits (0,2,4,6,8) is exactly 10.

Objective: None  
Output format: Output only the digit string
